awards_achievements: Selected coursework in Deep Learning, NLP, and Language-based Security

highlighted_projects.description: Fine-tuned a HyenaDNA sequence model to predict miRNA–target interactions using human miRNA and mRNA 3′ UTR sequence data. Built a preprocessing pipeline to generate positive and negative interaction pairs, standardized variable-length sequences, and evaluated model performance using ROC and AUROC metrics. Compared pretrained and from-scratch HyenaDNA models against a CNN baseline and applied in-silico mutagenesis to analyze seed versus non-seed region importance.
highlighted_projects.name: miRNA–Target Interaction Prediction with HyenaDNA

highlighted_projects.description: Developed and evaluated multiple machine learning and deep learning models to predict customer default risk on large-scale time-series financial data from the American Express Kaggle challenge. Built standalone models using LightGBM, GRU, CNN, and Transformer architectures, applied extensive data preprocessing and feature engineering, and constructed a lightweight ensemble using weighted averaging to improve predictive performance under the AMEX evaluation metric.
highlighted_projects.name: Credit Default Prediction with Time-Series Ensembles

jarvis_projects.description: Designed and implemented a Linux-based cluster monitoring system that collects  host hardware specifications and real-time resource usage metrics using Bash scripts and PostgreSQL. Automated data collection with cron jobs and stored results in relational tables for analysis and reporting.
jarvis_projects.name: Cluster Monitor

jarvis_projects.description: - Grep App: Implemented a grep utility in Core Java that recursively  searches large file systems using regular expressions, streams matching lines to  output files, and supports memory-efficient processing with Java Streams, Maven packaging,  logging, and Docker-based deployment.
jarvis_projects.name: Core Java Apps

jarvis_projects.description: Designed and implemented a data analytics proof-of-concept for a retail e-commerce business. Built an end-to-end analytics workflow using Python, Pandas, NumPy, and Matplotlib in Jupyter Notebook to clean, transform, and analyze transactional sales data. Performed sales trend analysis, customer activity analysis, cancellation analysis, and RFM-based customer segmentation to generate actionable business insights. Using data warehouse, PostgreSQL and Docker,  enabling structured analytical queries and reproducible data analysis workflows.
jarvis_projects.name: Retail Data Analytics and Wrangling

name: Steven Wen

professional_experience.description: Built a Linux-based cluster monitoring system using Bash, PostgreSQL, and Docker to collect and store host hardware and resource usage metrics. Currently developing core Java applications to enhance object-oriented design and database integration skills.
professional_experience.title: Software Developer

professional_experience.description: Designed and implemented SQL-based data extraction and cleansing workflows on AWS RDS, removing duplicates and standardizing schemas. Built reproducible ETL pipelines to prepare model-ready datasets and developed Tableau and Power BI dashboards to deliver actionable business insights to senior stakeholders.
professional_experience.title: Data Engineer Intern

professional_experience.description: Built an automated digital pathology pipeline using Python and QuPath to process over 10,000 whole-slide images. Trained YOLOv8 and StarDist models for segmentation and cell-level classification, improving diagnostic consistency and reducing manual workload by more than 60%.
professional_experience.title: Assistant Machine Learning Engineer

professional_experience.description: Built a real-time data ingestion pipeline using Apache Kafka and Apache NiFi to stream and transform high-volume sensor data. Designed publish–subscribe workflows to convert raw CSV data into JSON and ingest it into MongoDB for immediate access and lakeFS for version-controlled data lake storage.
professional_experience.title: Data Engineer Intern

summary: I am a Data Engineer and Software Developer with a strong foundation in computer science, data engineering, and machine learning. I recently completed my Master of Computer Science at McGill University, where I focused on deep learning, NLP, and language-based security. Through internships and research roles, I have built scalable ETL pipelines, real-time streaming systems, and AI-driven analytics solutions using Python, SQL, and Spark, with  exposure to cloud-based data workflows. I am particularly excited about the software industry  because it allows me to transform complex data into impactful systems that support decision-making,  automation, and innovation.
